'''wakodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugari|ugari]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugari|ugari]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wakodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wækedheth|wækedheth]] || [[word:wækedhej|wækedhej]] || [[word:wækedhesh|wækedhesh]] || [[word:wækedhe|wækedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wakokodhoth|wakokodhoth]] || [[word:wakokodhoj|wakokodhoj]] || [[word:wakokodhosh|wakokodhosh]] || [[word:wakokodho|wakokodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wakodhoth|wakodhoth]] || [[word:wakodhoj|wakodhoj]] || [[word:wakodhosh|wakodhosh]] || [[word:wakodho|wakodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wakofdhoth|wakofdhoth]] || [[word:wakofdhoj|wakofdhoj]] || [[word:wakofdhosh|wakofdhosh]] || [[word:wakofdhof|wakofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wakodhotho|wakodhotho]] || [[word:wakodhojo|wakodhojo]] || [[word:wakodhosho|wakodhosho]] || [[word:wakodhoko|wakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wakodhoth|wakodhoth]] || [[word:wakodhoj|wakodhoj]] || [[word:wakodhosh|wakodhosh]] || [[word:wakodho|wakodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wakodhothol|wakodhothol]] || [[word:wakodhojol|wakodhojol]] || [[word:wakodhoshol|wakodhoshol]] || [[word:wakodhokol|wakodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wakodhothotho|wakodhothotho]] || [[word:wakodhojojo|wakodhojojo]] || [[word:wakodhoshosho|wakodhoshosho]] || [[word:wakodhoko|wakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wakodhothon|wakodhothon]] || [[word:wakodhojon|wakodhojon]] || [[word:wakodhoshon|wakodhoshon]] || [[word:wakodhokon|wakodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wakodhothoro|wakodhothoro]] || [[word:wakodhojoro|wakodhojoro]] || [[word:wakodhoshoro|wakodhoshoro]] || [[word:wakodhokoro|wakodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
